mapper.select: select * from member where id = #{id} and member_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert: insert into member values (#{id}, #{pwd}, #{name}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{address}, sysdate, sysdate, default, default)
mapper.select:
select * from (select board_id bid_btype, board_title , board_create_date cd, to_char(board_count) bc_rc from board where board_writer = #{id} and board_status = 'Y' order by board_id desc) where rownum <= 5
union
select * from (select board_type-3, board_title, reply_create_date, reply_content from reply join board on (board_id=ref_board_id) where reply_writer = #{id} and reply_status='Y' order by reply_create_date desc) where rownum <= 5 order by 1 desc
mapper.update: update member set name=#{name}, nickname=#{nickname}, email=#{email}, gender=#{gender}, age=#{age}, phone=#{phone}, address=#{address}, update_date=sysdate where id =#{id}
